prestazioni: Engine swap to a **6G74 3.5L V6 (60° DOHC 24V, 190kW stock)** with a **Garrett GT3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 60mm inducer)** and **HKS GT-SS 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo manifold** for a target of 450whp on **E85 fuel** with **ID1000x injectors** and a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** for precise boost control (22psi peak)

Full **Mitsubishi Evo VIII RS front subframe conversion** with **Cusco Type RS coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear springs)** and **SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, sway bar links, and subframe mounts)** to eliminate torque steer under boost

Custom **3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system** with **Burns Stainless 4-2-1 merge collectors** and **MagnaFlow 14850 mufflers** (straight-through design) paired with a **Mitsubishi FTO GPX 6-speed manual transmission** (modified with **PPG close-ratio gears** and **OS Giken twin-plate clutch**)
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Verada-specific widebody kit** (front fenders extended 50mm, rear 70mm) with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** and **Voltex Type-3 rear wing (1,200mm width, 300mm height)** for downforce at 180km/h+

**Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +38 (front) and 18x10.5 +45 (rear) wheels** with **Yokohama Advan A052 255/35/18 (front) and 285/30/18 (rear) tires** for staggered fitment, paired with **Project Mu 999.9 brake pads** and **DBA 5000 Series slotted rotors**

**Full custom interior** featuring **Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved)** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses**, **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede)**, and **custom carbon fiber dashboard overlay** with **AEM X-Series digital dash** replacing the stock cluster
